gatekeeper.signal: Persistent contraction of the frontalis; a facial posture held for 'performance' rather than utility.
gatekeeper.consequence: Reduced range of facial fluidity; broadcasts a static, defensive state that masks your genuine presence.
gatekeeper.ritual: Apply 10 seconds of localized heat. Anchor the scalp; glide the forehead tissue upward until resistance dissipates.

traps.signal: Chronic shoulder elevation; occupational residue from years of high-stress management.
traps.consequence: Narrowed breathing and head-forward projection; broadcasts anxiety during high-stakes scrutiny.
traps.ritual: Apply firm downward pressure on the trapezius ridge while slowly rotating the head to the opposite side.
